title: Part 2 – Question-Réponse : le parking
instructions: Écoutez la question et les trois réponses possibles. Choisissez la réponse la plus appropriée.
audioText: Where can I park my car during the renovation? (A) There's a temporary lot behind the building. (B) The renovation starts next week. (C) I drive to work every day.

choices: There's a temporary lot behind the building.
I drive to work every day.
questions.explanation: "Where can I park?" demande un lieu. (A) indique un parking temporaire. (B) répond à "When", (C) donne une habitude personnelle.
